meaning: n.文尼(Vincent 的昵称,亦作 Vinnie)(m.)
examples: Vinny: Uh, you know, thanks anyway... but I think we're good.
Vinny: you know, I'm going to reopen the flower shop and I 'm going to think of you guys every single day.
Or how about a tattoo parlor? What would happen if the artist were painstakingly etching the name Vinny into the fleshy arm of a crotchety client when the resident dog accidentally bumped his arm?
The firm was created by Vinny Smith, who was the CEO of Quest Software.
Their sons, Vinny Jr. and Richard, liked to race hot rods at a speedway in Old Bridge.
